artist.name: CRUEL FICTION
artist.bio: Cruel Fiction is a cinematic alternative project built on tension, texture, and truth buried in sound. Forged in late nights and louder silences, the music pulls from post-punk shadows and modern dark pop ambition — songs that feel like confessions and sound like movies. This is where fiction bleeds.
